description: Anima style LoRA — captions start with @trigger_style. followed by dense NL prose describing the scene content. The trigger token teaches the style; the caption teaches the content.

variables.name: trigger_style
variables.prompt: Style/artist trigger tag (e.g. greg_rutkowski, studio_ghibli, vintage_anime_90s) — placed as @trigger_style. at the start of every caption
